chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 129 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.533/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.534/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 30.01.2024 M/s Israr Ahmed Shah and Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocates for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of Election Commission of Pakistan, Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waive notice of this petition. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
